ab: lo amiyaobo, ai mwbaliyo ko agili ka sawalay.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: konako si kaingoli amwa nai maci langai sa tarokoko, adolro kwaobo ka mwadringai akane ki agili ka sawalay.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: sa lribate nai talacenga, ikai talacenga yakai ka makala ka ngetangeta ka laceng.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，菜攤有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: walangai nai sa ’incai, bakway si ningiging.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: kwani tawki ka thilri tiyang ka kilrangai sa madro mawriva matikaikay amiya, “malrimeme kai angodraleli si vinwate obawbala. lwangai’a kobekela!”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: la langai nai angodrale si vinwate obawbala.
sa lribate nai kai tiyang ka kilrangai sa botolo, la mawriva tawki matikay, “ai langai sa manema? kaivaiyana madraw si karocolo kai tarokoko, tolro ka idai ka ’aiso ka eea.”
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: lo miniya ka makocingalre aramoro kidremedreme ki kaingoli, si kielraelra tawki kalekete ma’adolro kobekela.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: la kwani tawki tobale nai amiya ma’adodolronga, kai kalekete ’oda’eda’e ’aiso laiya.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: kodra yathili ka tawki la dawdawdaw, nyama lwangai’a kaangeli, madraw si ma’adolro laiya.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: sabilrilanenga walangai nai tarokoko si kaang mwdaane twaga asiyaete ki too.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: maolai nai kiya lalavalava si madralemedremenga.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: la ki’adrelre agili nakowa mawriva matikay, atwanaw kanai isasadra swa sivwtai, naw mwbaliyako lo elra taisadrasadraza.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: ko kaingoli mawriva amiyaikay twaganga ko taleke, mwa dawlo lrakay takane’a!
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: la dawdawlo nai ki lraretesa si lratalagi, akela maelele mita akiso’ili kane kwaobo ka taleke.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
